case_title: JOSEPH K CHOI VS. VICTOR MANUEL MORALES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $ 0 SERVED SEP-17-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, VICTOR MANUEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-10-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JOSEPH K CHOI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTOR MANUEL MORALES IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JOSEPH CHOI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTOR MANUEL MORALES IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOI, JOSEPH K RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, VICTOR MANUEL $8,050.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,125.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,750.00 FILED BY CHOI, JOSEPH K AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, VICTOR MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
